_comment: Frozen RSS fixture for FR-014 AC-014-2 snapshot testing. Each entry mirrors the n8n RSS-Feed-Read node's output shape (`item.json` per entry: title, isoDate, contentSnippet/description). Times anchored to 2026-05-03T15:00:00Z so the 'within 24h' filter test is deterministic regardless of when the test runs (the news.ts module accepts a `now` injection for this).

items.title: Fed minutes signal hawkish lean ahead of June meeting
items.contentSnippet: Federal Reserve officials emphasized inflation risks at their April meeting, with several members suggesting rates may need to stay higher for longer than markets expect.

items.title: ECB's Lagarde: progress on inflation insufficient for rate cut
items.contentSnippet: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde said today that the bank needs more evidence inflation is sustainably returning to its 2% target before considering rate cuts.

items.title: USD/JPY surges past 156 on widening yield gap
items.description: The yen weakened to a fresh multi-decade low against the dollar as a widening US-Japan yield differential continues to attract carry-trade flows.

items.title: Stale article from 2 days ago — should be FILTERED OUT
items.contentSnippet: This entry is older than 24h and must not appear in the rendered output.

items.title: Article missing isoDate — should be FILTERED OUT
items.contentSnippet: No isoDate field — must not crash the parser AND must not appear in output.
